author: qu0b
content: <@402080271563751435> This is a great question but i'd rather like to defer from documentation to an initial methodology about how it makes sense to go about testing. I'd also like to keep it short and simple. The more developers you have using your software, the easier you make it to recreate bugs, the more issues you will catch before things go to production.

author: taulepton_
content: How would you propose we address this? I'm mindful that introducing the prover brings new considerations and context that many will be unfamiliar with. I can put together a doc that provides an overview to fill the context gap for users. Following that, I'm wondering if it would be useful to have a forum or breakout call to explore testing architecture/patterns that fit well and to provide the capability to observe/test what we want to build confidence in.
